SEARCH
Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.spring

Class SpringProcessEngineServicesConfiguration

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.spring.SpringProcessEngineServicesConfiguration
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineServices
@Configuration public class SpringProcessEngineServicesConfiguration extends Object implements org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.ProcessEngineServices
Exposes all camunda process engine services as beans.
Author:
Jan Galinski
